Instruction: You are a food allergen tester (User ID: customer_010). Ask the AI Service Agent to inspect the dishes in the top section of the leftmost foldout. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine if there are any dishes in this category with a tax rate higher than 0.1. If so, ask the AI Service Agent to find the gluten-free dish with the highest protein in the top area of the middle foldout and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest protein among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to select the high-fat dish with the lowest price from the category containing the last dish you pointed at and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Subsequently, ask the AI Service Agent to select a nut-free dish with the lowest calories from the top section of the rightmost foldout and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest calories among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to summarize and calculate the total calcium content of the current order.
analysis:
1. Detect the dishes in the top section of the leftmost page.

2. If any dish in this category has a tax rate higher than 0.1, go to the top section of the middle page, select the gluten-free dish with the highest protein content, and add it to the order. If multiple dishes tie for the highest protein content, add all of them.

3. If no dish in this category has a tax rate higher than 0.1, go to the category containing the last dish, select the high-fat dish with the lowest price, and add it to the order. If multiple dishes tie for the lowest price, add all of them.

4. In the top section of the rightmost page, select the nut-free dish with the lowest calorie count and add it to the order. If multiple dishes tie for the lowest calorie count, add all of them.

5. Finally, summarize and calculate the total calcium content of the current order.

Instruction: You are a nutritionist (User ID: customer_007) planning a balanced meal. Ask the AI Service Agent to find a meal item in the category within the white rounded box at the very top of the middle fold that contains gluten and has the highest protein content. Next, ask the AI Service Agent to find a low-sodium dish with the lowest price in the section at the very bottom of the left fold and add it to the order. analysis:
1. In the category within the white rounded box at the top of the middle fold, identify the item(s) that contain nuts and have the highest protein content. If multiple items tie for the highest protein content, select all of them.

2. If the price of the selected item(s) exceeds 60 yuan, navigate to the category at the top right of the overall menu and add the dish(es) with herbal flavor and the lowest fat content to the order. If multiple dishes tie for the lowest fat content, add one of each.

3. If the price of the selected item(s) is 60 yuan or less, navigate to the last indicated category and add the item(s) that are high in calcium and have the largest discount to the order. If multiple items tie for the largest discount, add one of each.

4. In the section at the bottom of the left fold, add the dish(es) that are low in sodium and have the lowest price to the order. If multiple dishes tie for the lowest price, add one of each.

5. Finally, calculate the total calorie count for all items in the current order.

3. If not all items in this category have a tax rate exceeding 0.08, go to the area with a dark background on the right fold. Select the high-fat item with the highest calories and add it to the order. If multiple items tie for the highest calories, add all of them.

4. In the category pointed to for the second time, select the dish that is slightly salty/mild and has the highest sugar content, and add it to the order. If multiple items tie for the highest sugar content, add all of them.

5. Calculate the total fiber content for this order.

Instruction: You are a chef (User ID: customer_005), preparing a special menu. Ask the AI Service Agent to focus on the second section from the top on the left brochure page. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine if there are any dishes without discounts in this section. If so, ask the AI Service Agent to find a dish with high protein and the lowest price in the category you pointed at for the third time, and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to select a meal with smoked flavor and the highest protein from the top section of the right brochure page and add it to the order. If there are multiple meals tied for the highest protein among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Ask the AI Service Agent to check if there is a meal set that includes the dish just selected. If so, remove the dish just added from the order, and instead add the meal set containing this dish to the order. After that, ask the AI Service Agent to select a dish that is salty and umami and has the lowest fat from the area with a small hand illustration on the right border of the middle brochure page, and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest fat among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total tax and fees for the entire order.
analysis:
1. Focus on the second section from the top on the left flap.

2. If there are undiscounted dishes in this section, then within the category pointed at for the third time, select the dish with a buttery flavor and the lowest price to add to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added.

3. If there are no undiscounted dishes in this section, then within the topmost section on the right flap, select the meal item with a smoked flavor and the highest protein content to add to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest protein among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added.

4. Check if any combo set includes the dish(es) just added. If so, remove the individual dish(es) and add the corresponding combo set(s) to the order instead.

5. In the area on the right border of the middle flap that features a small hand illustration, select the dish with a salty-savory flavor and the lowest fat content to add to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest fat among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added.

6. Calculate the total tax amount for the entire order.
